parameters.filterByFormula: =AND({Status}='Active', {ReactivationOptOut}!=TRUE(), OR(AND(DATETIME_DIFF(TODAY(), {LastVisitDate}, 'days') >= 30, DATETIME_DIFF(TODAY(), {LastVisitDate}, 'days') < 35), AND(DATETIME_DIFF(TODAY(), {LastVisitDate}, 'days') >= 60, DATETIME_DIFF(TODAY(), {LastVisitDate}, 'days') < 65), AND(DATETIME_DIFF(TODAY(), {LastVisitDate}, 'days') >= 90, DATETIME_DIFF(TODAY(), {LastVisitDate}, 'days') < 95)))
